leadText: Weak Armor (Japanese: くだけるよろい Broken Armor) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations V and VI 1.1.2 Generation VII onwards 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations V and VI [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a physical move , its Defense is decreased by one stage and its Speed is increased by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a physical multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Generation VII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Weak Armor now raises Speed by two stages. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Weak Armor has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations V and VI [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a physical move , its Defense is decreased by one stage and its Speed is increased by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a physical multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Generation VII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Weak Armor now raises Speed by two stages.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI When the Pokémon is hit by a physical move, its Defense goes down, but its Travel Speed rises. * When it's hit by a physical move, the Pokémon's Defense goes down, and its Travel Speed goes up! * S MD When it's hit by a physical move, the Pokémon's Defense goes down and its Travel Speed goes up!
